title: Galaxy Research Cuts CLARITY Act Passage Odds to 50-50 as Senate Clock Runs Out
summary: Galaxy Research now sees a 50-50 chance of the CLARITY Act passing the Senate, citing dwindling time before Congress's August recess and mounting legislative uncertainty.
body: Galaxy Research has lowered its odds of the CLARITY Act passing the Senate to 50-50, citing dwindling time before Congress's August recess and mounting legislative uncertainty. The research firm points to the limited time left in the legislative calendar as a significant factor in the reduced odds. With the Senate's schedule packed and other legislative priorities competing for attention, the CLARITY Act's passage is becoming increasingly uncertain. The CLARITY Act is a proposed bill that seeks to establish clear regulatory guidelines for digital assets. Its successful passage could provide much-needed regulatory clarity for Bitcoin and other cryptocurrency businesses and investors, potentially boosting market confidence. As the Senate clock runs out, stakeholders in the crypto industry are watching closely. If the bill fails to pass before the recess, it may face further delays or even stall entirely.
twitterThread: Galaxy Research cut the CLARITY Act's Senate passage odds to 50-50, citing dwindling time before the August recess and mounting legislative uncertainty.
The bill aims to provide regulatory clarity for Bitcoin and other digital assets, but the window to pass it is closing fast as the Senate calendar fills up.
